# Changelog

---

## [0.1.0] - 25/04/2026

Alpha release of Next Pilot Logbook for testing. Please not that the project is still in early development and this release isn only for testing purposes.

At this stage, you should **NOT** rely on it as your sole record-keeping solution for flight logs.

### Features

- Logs - Create, Read & Update
- Crew - Create, Read & Update
- Fleet - Create, Read & Update
- Airports - Airport database with 29293 airprots
- Dashboard - Basic information and statistics overview
- Settings - Change preferences and update profile settings
